testcase.name: test_scam_check_high_creates_case_alert

failure.message: AssertionError: no new alert for High verdict assert 200 > 200

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:75: in test_scam_check_high_creates_case_alert assert alerts_after > alerts_before, "no new alert for High verdict" E AssertionError: no new alert for High verdict E assert 200 > 200

testcase.name: test_graph

failure.message: AssertionError: nodes count=23 assert 25 <= 23 + where 23 = len([{'id': 'A-P1', 'label': '+91 98110 33301', 'type': 'phone', 'cluster': 'A', ...}, {'id': 'A-P2', 'label': '+91 98110 33302', 'type': 'phone', 'cluster': 'A', ...}, {'id': 'A-B1', 'label': 'HDFC-8842 (Mule)', 'type': 'account', 'cluster': 'A', ...}, {'id': 'A-B2', 'label': 'SBI-1177 (Mule)', 'type': 'account', 'cluster': 'A', ...}, {'id': 'A-D1', 'label': 'IMEI-3355-A', 'type': 'device', 'cluster': 'A', ...}, {'id': 'A-V1', 'label': 'Victim R.S.', 'type': 'victim', 'cluster': 'A', ...}, ...])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:178: in test_graph assert 25 <= len(d["nodes"]) <= 30, f"nodes count={len(d['nodes'])}" E AssertionError: nodes count=23 E assert 25 <= 23 E + where 23 = len([{'id': 'A-P1', 'label': '+91 98110 33301', 'type': 'phone', 'cluster': 'A', ...}, {'id': 'A-P2', 'label': '+91 98110 33302', 'type': 'phone', 'cluster': 'A', ...}, {'id': 'A-B1', 'label': 'HDFC-8842 (Mule)', 'type': 'account', 'cluster': 'A', ...}, {'id': 'A-B2', 'label': 'SBI-1177 (Mule)', 'type': 'account', 'cluster': 'A', ...}, {'id': 'A-D1', 'label': 'IMEI-3355-A', 'type': 'device', 'cluster': 'A', ...}, {'id': 'A-V1', 'label': 'Victim R.S.', 'type': 'victim', 'cluster': 'A', ...}, ...])
